Striding forward with plasma rifle raised to shoulder, left arm extended steadying the barrel, weight shifted onto front foot in advancing stance.
Standing upright scanning holographic wrist display, right arm angled across chest, left hand adjusting controls, head tilted downward reading data.
Climbing vertical rocky outcrop, arms stretched overhead gripping ledge, one leg bent pushing upward, torso extended in ascending reach.
Kneeling on one knee examining alien artifact, torso bent forward, both hands manipulating device, scanner held close inspecting glowing surface.
Bracing wide stance against strong wind, leaning backward, one arm raised shielding visor, other arm extended gripping support beam for balance.
Reaching upward welding overhead hull panel, torch held high in right hand, left arm braced against wall, neck craned back observing work.
Walking forward while holstering sidearm with right hand, left arm carrying equipment case at side, transitioning from combat to exploration stance.
Standing on elevated boulder surveying terrain ahead, one foot raised on higher rock, hand shading eyes from twin suns, torso upright.
Hauling salvaged equipment crate over right shoulder, left arm steadying load, legs in wide walking stride, torso angled from carried weight.
Aiming sniper rifle from standing position, weapon braced against shoulder, left leg forward, right arm gripping stock, body coiled in precision stance.
Crouched behind cover adjusting weapon attachment, right knee down, left leg bent supporting weight, both hands working on rifle maintenance mid-combat.
Scaling ladder rungs one-handed, right arm reaching upward for next grip, left hand holding scanner device, legs climbing in alternating step.
Gesturing tactical signals with raised left arm, right hand gripping rifle barrel pointed down, standing upright facing away toward unseen squad.
Leaning forward collecting geological sample, torso bent at waist, right hand extending tool toward ground, left leg back balancing weight distribution.
Dragging wounded team member backward, both arms hooked under shoulders, legs in wide reverse stride, torso twisted from exertion and pulling weight.
Standing twisted at waist checking rear motion tracker, right arm extended holding scanner outward, left hand on holstered weapon, alert scanning posture.
Vaulting over low barricade, hands planted on surface pushing bodyweight forward, front leg raised mid-clearance, rear leg extended behind in athletic motion.
Adjusting helmet seal with both hands raised to head, standing upright, elbows out wide, preparing suit systems before atmospheric exposure begins.
Steadying balance on narrow beam, arms extended horizontally outward for stability, torso upright, legs positioned carefully one foot before other.
Reloading rifle while advancing, weapon held diagonally across body, right hand inserting magazine, left arm supporting barrel, legs mid-stride forward.
Prying open stuck hatch with both hands gripping crowbar, arms angled downward applying force, one leg braced back, torso leaning into leverage.
Standing at control terminal operating interface, left hand on keyboard panel, right arm reaching overhead adjusting hanging cables, upright technical stance.
Shouldering heavy portable shield generator, both arms wrapped around cylindrical equipment, torso tilted from asymmetric load, walking forward with determined stride.
Checking bioscan readings while walking, device held forward in left hand, right arm swinging naturally at side, head angled down toward screen.
Calibrating targeting laser on elevated position, kneeling on right knee, left leg bent supporting rifle on thigh, arms adjusting scope alignment carefully.
